name: CREATE_AGENT: Restart dm monitor pro ag

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "CREATE_AGENT: Restart dm monitor pro ag" initialized.

result.reply:
Maine dekha ki aapko `DM_Monitor_Pro` agent ko restart karna hai. Iske liye, main **manage_agent** tool ka use karungi. Yeh tool OpenClaw system mein existing agents ke lifecycle ko manage karne ke liye hai, jismein restart karna bhi shaamil hai.

I'll use the **manage_agent** tool because it's the designated system control mechanism for agent state changes.

Confirm karu?
